'''Wes Apice''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] civilian who lived on a [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]]–controlled [[Planet/Legends|planet]] at some point during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. He; his brother, [[Bryn Apice|Bryn]]; and their friend, [[Rayt (civilian)|Rayt]] dressed up as [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]] in order to get off of their war-torn world.<ref name="Databank" />
